overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dense coniferous forest along a winding dirt trail. The character progresses from deep woodland past a stream with a wooden bridge, culminating at a rocky waterfall pool where he enters the water.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding forest trail surrounded by tall pine trees

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain visible through the tree canopy in the distance
tall coniferous trees forming dense forest walls
tall coniferous trees forming dense forest walls
narrow winding path through the forest undergrowth
green grass and small plants lining the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense coniferous forest with tall pine trees flanking a narrow dirt trail. The camera follows Geralt from behind as he walks steadily forward, with a distant mountain peak visible through gaps in the canopy. The lighting is dappled and diffused through the tree cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest stream crossing with wooden bridge

events.description: fallen tree trunk appears on the right side of the trail
wooden bridge over stream becomes visible to the right
waterfall becomes visible in the distance through the trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail passing fallen logs and approaching the stream crossing

entered.detail: large decaying tree trunk lying across the forest floor
small flowing stream with clear water running alongside the path
rustic wooden footbridge crossing the stream
tall waterfall cascading down cliff face visible through the trees
steep rock face forming the backdrop behind the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The forest opens slightly as the trail approaches a stream. A fallen tree trunk lies on the right, and a rustic wooden bridge crosses the flowing water. In the distance, a waterfall becomes visible cascading down a rocky cliff face, signaling the destination ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall pool at base of cliff

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the cliff face near the waterfall
character steps off the trail and enters the water at the waterfall base

agents.ego_description: walking down the rocky slope toward the waterfall pool and wading into the water

entered.detail: rocky pool at the base of the waterfall with flowing water
moss-covered rocks surrounding the pool edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the waterfall, which dominates the view as the character descends toward the pool. The wooden bridge and forest trail recede behind as Geralt reaches the rocky shore and steps into the water at the base of the cascading falls, surrounded by mist and the sound of rushing water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense coniferous forest that gradually opens into a dramatic rocky waterfall landscape. It begins by following Geralt from behind along a narrow dirt trail, where dappled light filters through tall pine trees and a distant mountain peak is visible through the canopy. As the forest thins, the trail leads toward a flowing stream crossed by a rustic wooden bridge, while a cascading waterfall emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts toward the cliff face as the character descends from the trail, leaving the bridge behind to reach the rocky shore. Finally, the camera follows Geralt as he steps into the mist-shrouded pool at the base of the falls, surrounded by the rushing water.
